title: OpenLink Chmlfrp Extension
body:
# OpenLink Chmlfrp Extension
# **THIS MOD'S UPDATING IS PAUSED DUE TO OPENLINK'S STOP**
# **由于OpenLink的停更，本模组也停更了**
# **PLEASE WAIT FOR OPENLINK2 AND MY REWRITE**
# **请等待OpenLink2的重写和我的适配**
An OpenLink addon for Chmlfrp.
[mcmod.cn 中文简介](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/25188.html)
### Based on OpenLink's `Frpc` API
## Description
Added a frp support called [Chmlfrp](https://www.chmlfrp.net/) through openlink.
Now you can add your Chmlfrp account and enjoy following feature:

- Auto Node Selection
- Auto Proxy Creation and Recycle
- Auto Frpc Management
- Create Proxy just in-game

## Suppported Versions
| Version/Modloader | Fabric/Quilt | Forge | NeoForge    |
|:----------------- | ------------ | ----- | ----------- |
| 1.16.5            | Doing        | Planning | Unsupported |
| 1.18.2            | Doing        | Planning   | Unsupported |
| 1.19.2            | Doing        | Planning   | Unsupported |
| 1.20.1            | Doing        | Did   | Did |
| 1.20.4            | Doing        | Unknow   | Unknow |
| 1.21+             | Planning | Planning | Planning |

## Config
You can config such configurations through mod's command:
```command
/coe
\--setProxyCreationMaxRetry
|   \ no argument: return current value
|   \ <value> set to value range 1~2147483647
|
\--setDoAdvancedNodeSort
|   \no argument: return current value
|   \ <value> set to value true or false
|
\--reloadUserInfo
```
